title: Build a safe queue consumer
description: Construct a consumer with bounded concurrency, idempotent handling, ack-on-success, and dead-lettering.
body: Steps: 1. Fetch with a prefetch/concurrency bound matching downstream capacity. 2. Make the handler idempotent on the message id so redelivery is safe. 3. Ack only after the effect is durably committed; nack with backoff on transient failure. 4. Count attempts and route to a DLQ after the cap. 5. Drain on shutdown. Rollback point: before increasing prefetch. Validation: redelivery test shows a single effect, a poison message reaches the DLQ, and acks never precede commit.
